decision: Target ZK/STARK companies for Manuel's job search
premises: ZK/STARK engineers are among highest-paid in crypto ($200K-$500K)
Manuel has Cairo, Rust, Starknet experience (MIDAS, Neon Covenant)
The market has a severe shortage of ZK engineers
Remote positions exist at top companies
reasoning: Manuel's unique combination of ZK cryptography + AI engineering + original research (PUT/ASA) positions him in the intersection of two of the most scarce skillsets. Cold outreach to StarkWare, Paradigm, etc. targets the right companies but may not be the fastest path — warm intros or hackathon wins could convert faster.
conclusion: Continue ZK job targeting but diversify approach: cold email + hackathon + grant applications + Moltbook reputation building
alternatives_considered: Focus only on AI engineering jobs
Focus on building Bluewave as product
risks_identified: Cold email to C-suite rarely converts
Manuel's time split between Ialum and job hunting
Manic phase may affect interview performance
